TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Furkan_Aldemir, title = Furkan_Aldemir, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Furkan_Aldemir} }

S.FORM: Furkan Aldemir Furkan Aldemir hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 8, Furkan Aldemir, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Furkan Aldemir Furkan Aldemir hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 8, Furkan Aldemir, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *urkan al*emir *urkan al*emir ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *urkan al*emir, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
